description_long: This is a robust, double-leaf driveway gate flanked by two large stone pillars. The gate itself is constructed from black metal bars with a solid lower panel, providing both security and partial visibility. The pillars are made of dark stone with lighter stone bases and are topped with metallic, dome-shaped caps. The metalwork of the gate features a gentle upward curve at the top, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for urban residential or commercial entrances. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to weathering.
description: A sturdy black metal driveway gate with solid lower panels, flanked by large stone pillars topped with metallic caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full double-leaf gate, both stone pillars, and the curved top of the metal bars.
description_view_1: Side view of a single stone pillar with its metallic cap, showing the pillar's depth and construction.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the gate's structure and both supporting pillars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the other stone pillar, mirroring the features seen in view 1.
